title: Magical Crispy Polish Lamb Bowl
description: A briny, crispy, and quick-fix Polish dish featuring lamb shanks, mushimono-steam, and ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients, served in an earthenware bowl.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb shanks with salt, black pepper, and caraway seeds.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the lamb shanks until browned on all sides.
Transfer the lamb shanks to a large earthenware bowl and add the minced garlic, dried thyme, lemon juice, and chicken broth.
Cover the bowl with a lid or aluminum foil and steam the lamb shanks in the oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the lid or foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the lamb is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the bowl from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb shanks hot, garnished with fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
